hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); FP=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""' 2>/dev/null); [ -z "$FP" ] && echo '{"continue":true}' && exit 0; case "$FP" in */settings.local.json|*.env) echo '{"continue":false,"stopReason":"BLOCKED: protected file — use 年老师 confirmation first"}' ;; *) echo '{"continue":true}' ;; esac

CACHE_FILE="/tmp/.claude_read_cache_$${MYAGENTS_SESSION_ID:-$$}"; INPUT=$(cat); FP=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""' 2>/dev/null); [ -z "$FP" ] && echo '{"continue":true}' && exit 0; echo "$INPUT" | jq -e '.tool_input.offset // .tool_input.limit' >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo '{"continue":true}' && exit 0; if [ -f "$CACHE_FILE" ] && grep -qxF "$FP" "$CACHE_FILE" 2>/dev/null; then echo "{\"continue\":false,\"stopReason\":\"SKIP: $FP already read this session (cached)\"}"; exit 0; fi; mkdir -p "$(dirname "$CACHE_FILE")"; echo "$FP" >> "$CACHE_FILE"; echo '{"continue":true}'

INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""' 2>/dev/null); [ -z "$CMD" ] && echo '{"continue":true}' && exit 0; if echo "$CMD" | grep -q 'git diff' && ! echo "$CMD" | grep -q 'compress-diff' && ! echo "$CMD" | grep -qE 'git diff --(stat|name-only|name-status)'; then SCRIPT_DIR="/Users/sundanian/Documents/projects/ai-agents/my-agent/.claude"; NEW_CMD="$${CMD} | bash $${SCRIPT_DIR}/scripts/compress-diff.sh"; echo "$INPUT" | jq --arg cmd "$NEW_CMD" '{"continue":true,"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","updatedInput":(.tool_input.command = $cmd)}}'; exit 0; fi; echo '{"continue":true}'
